name: smartolt
description: SmartOLT - Network Management System for ISP

scripts.dev: npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:workers
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w workers
scripts.lint: npm -w frontend run lint && npm -w backend run lint && npm -w workers run lint
scripts.type-check: npm -w frontend run type-check && npm -w backend run type-check && npm -w workers run type-check
